headline: Decision-fatigue offload — assistant pulls calendar + weather + vault preferences to suggest evening plans

text: Terry. It's 5:30pm Friday. I'm fried. What should I do tonight?
Pull my calendar for the next 3 hours. Anything I'm forgetting?
What's the weather right now and the next 4 hours?
I don't want to drive. Walking distance only. What's nearby in my saved 'good places' list?
If I haven't saved a 'good places' list, that's the gap. Make one — ask me 5 quick questions to seed it.
Cuisine: I like Vietnamese, decent ramen, anything with grill smoke. Avoid: heavy Italian, sushi (had it twice this week).
Vibes: small, dimly lit, can hear the person across the table. Avoid: TVs on every wall, line out the door.
Solo or with people: solo right now is fine, but I'd say yes if my partner texted.
Distance: 15 min walk max.
Spend: $25-40 including a drink.
Save those as vault preferences. Audience terry only. Tag 'good-places-criteria'.
Now suggest 3 places that match. Be specific — names, walk time, why each fits.
I haven't told you my neighborhood. Ask me.
Trinity-Bellwoods, Toronto.
OK now suggest 3 places.
Pho Tien Thanh sounds right. But it's Friday — will there be a line?
Can you check Google for current wait time, or tell me you can't?
Fair. Pick the second option from your list — what was it again?
Add a calendar entry for 'dinner at Yasu' at 6:45pm. Hold for 2 hours.
Now — after dinner, what's open between 9 and 11pm that's quiet? I don't want a bar with music.
A bookstore. Good. Type Books on Queen — they open till when on Fridays?
If you don't know, just say so. Don't make it up.
OK pencil in 'Type Books browse' for 9-10pm. Soft hold — I might cancel.
What's my Saturday morning look like? I don't want to overcommit tonight if Saturday has an early thing.
Brunch at 10 with my sister. So I should be home by midnight at the latest.
Set a calendar reminder for 11:30pm tonight: 'head home'. Title only, no description.
OK plan summary — read it back to me as a 5-bullet list.
Save that as today's 'evening plan' journal entry. Audience terry only.
If my partner texts in the next hour saying 'want to do dinner', what do you suggest I say?
Right. Yasu doesn't take reservations and is 2-top friendly. Tell her about Yasu, propose 6:45pm.
Update the journal entry to reflect the contingency plan if she joins.
Done. Heading out. Thanks.
